data.title: Aave Initiates DeFi Rescue Following $292 Million KelpDAO Exploit
data.description:
Aave is leading a decentralized finance rescue effort, dubbed DeFi United, after a major exploit involving KelpDAO caused a $292 million shortfall in collateral backing rsETH. According to NS3.AI, Aave has announced that Lido, EtherFi, and its founder, Stani Kulechov, have proposed or expressed support for the initiative, which includes contributions of up to 2,500 stETH and two separate commitments of 5,000 ETH.

Aave's incident report revealed that the exploit left a deficit of over 112,000 rsETH. The attacker managed to mint 116,500 unbacked rsETH and utilized nearly 90,000 of them as collateral to borrow approximately $190 million in assets. In response, Arbitrum's security council previously froze 30,766 ETH linked to the exploit. However, Aave has stated that the current focus is on recapitalizing rsETH to address the situation.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description:
1. The rsETH incident has created a shortfall of approximately 68,900 ETH; multiple parties have donated 13,500 ETH.
2. US media: A US soldier profited over $400,000 betting on Maduro's arrest.
3. Aave founder Stani announced a personal donation of 5,000 ETH to address the current situation.
4. MegaETH will conduct a TGE on April 30th.
5. Mantle plans to provide Aave with a loan of 30,000 ETH; the confirmed bailout funds cover approximately 43,500 ETH.
6. Republican leaders demanded that Lutnick halt the political involvement of the crypto PAC in Texas.
7. Tether confirmed its cooperation with the US government to freeze over $344 million worth of USDT.
8. Aave suspended rsETH reserve operations on Ethereum, Arbitrum, and other networks to reduce systemic risk.
9. Sam Altman criticized Anthropic for using "fear marketing" to promote Claude Mythos, sparking AI security controversy.
10. GMGN 11. Sooth Labs raises $50 million, with Felicis Ventures participating; 12. RWA leveraged protocol 3F raises $4 million, led by Maven 11.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 78,000 USDT with a 0.22% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 24, 2026, 01:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 78,000 USDT and is now trading at 77,988.007813 USDT, with a narrowed 0.22% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: High-Stakes Bets Placed on Timberwolves vs. Nuggets NBA Playoff Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the Polymarket prediction event for the NBA Western Conference first-round Game 3 between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Denver Nuggets. According to Odaily, an account with over $3.6 million in profits has invested $90,000 on the Timberwolves to defeat the Nuggets, with an opening price of 45.7¢. Additionally, the account has placed an $80,000 bet on the Timberwolves with a 2.5-point spread.

The second game of the series is set to begin at 9:30 a.m. (UTC+8) today, with the series currently tied at 1-1. The Timberwolves' starting lineup includes McDaniels, Randle, Gobert, Edwards, and DiVincenzo, while the Nuggets will start Johnson, Spencer Jones, Jokic, Braun, and Murray.

data.title: Bitmine has staked another 98,352 ETH, bringing its total staked amount to 3,587,800 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, Tom Lee's Bitmine pledged another 98,352 ETH four hours ago, worth approximately $229 million. Currently, Bitmine has a total of 3,587,821 ETH pledged, worth approximately $8.35 billion, representing 72.1% of its total holdings.

data.title: Malaysia Palm Oil Council: Export Demand Weakens Amid Inflation and Economic Slowdown
data.description: The Malaysia Palm Oil Council has indicated that the demand for palm oil exports is softening due to inflation and sluggish economic growth in major importing countries. According to Jin10, this situation may impose a ceiling on crude palm oil prices. The council's assessment highlights the challenges faced by the palm oil industry as external economic factors influence market dynamics.

data.title: Hong Kong Stocks Open Lower as Hang Seng Index Drops 0.7%
data.description: Hong Kong's stock market opened with declines today, as the Hang Seng Index fell by 0.7%. According to Jin10, the Hang Seng Tech Index also experienced a decrease, opening down by 0.8%. These movements reflect a cautious start for the market.

data.title: Anthropic Addresses Claude Code Quality Issues
data.description: Anthropic has resolved several issues affecting the quality of its Claude Code, according to Odaily. The problems stemmed from three independent changes involving Claude Code, Claude Agent SDK, and Claude Cowork. On March 4, the default inference intensity was reduced from high to medium, leading to a decline in intelligence levels; this setting was restored on April 7. Additionally, a bug in the cache optimization feature introduced on March 26 led to the erroneous deletion of old inference records, causing the model to exhibit forgetfulness and repetition, which was fixed on April 10. Furthermore, system prompt words added on April 16 to reduce redundancy negatively impacted programming quality, and this change was reversed on April 20. All affected models have now returned to normal, and Anthropic has reset the usage limits for all subscribers.

data.title: Telegram Founder Announces Significant Reduction in TON Network Transaction Fees
data.description: Telegram founder Pavel Durov has announced a substantial reduction in transaction fees on the TON network. According to ChainCatcher, the fees will be decreased sixfold within a week, bringing the cost down to 0.00039 TON per transaction, approximately $0.0005. This fee will remain constant regardless of network load. Following this change, most transactions on the network will become entirely free, achieving zero transaction fees.

data.title: The Balancer attacker transferred 100 ETH and laundered them via Tornado Cash, still holding 21,900 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Balancer attacker, who had been dormant for five months, has transferred 100 ETH (approximately $233,000) to a new address and has begun transferring them via Tornado Cash. The attacker currently still holds 21,900 ETH, worth approximately $51.13 million.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Rises Amid Market Shifts
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has increased to 37, marking a three-point rise from the previous day. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the performance of the top 100 coins by market capitalization over the past 90 days, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, in comparison to Bitcoin. This uptick suggests a shift in market dynamics, highlighting the growing interest and performance of altcoins relative to Bitcoin.

data.title: Philippine Central Bank Governor: Multiple Rate Hikes Planned as Needed
data.description: The Governor of the Philippine Central Bank has announced plans for multiple interest rate hikes as necessary. According to Jin10, this decision is part of the bank's strategy to address economic conditions and maintain financial stability. The central bank aims to respond proactively to inflationary pressures and other economic challenges. The governor emphasized the importance of flexibility in monetary policy to ensure the country's economic resilience.

data.title: US stocks closed lower across the board for crypto stocks, with ALTS falling more than 7.61%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.36%, the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.41%, and the S&P 500 fell 0.89%. The crypto sector generally declined, with ALTS falling over 7.61%, ABTC falling 5.97%, HOOD falling 5.53%, COIN falling 4.03%, and CRCL falling 4.17%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows Amid Market Activity
data.description: Solana spot ETFs experienced substantial net inflows of $7.3314 million yesterday, according to NS3.AI, citing data from SoSoValue. The Bitwise Solana Staking ETF was the primary contributor, accounting for $6.2012 million of the inflows. The total net asset value across all SOL spot ETFs reached $874 million, reflecting ongoing investor interest in Solana-related financial products.

data.title: Tether Mints Additional $1 Billion USDT on Ethereum Network
data.description: Tether has minted another $1 billion USDT on the Ethereum network. According to ChainCatcher, this brings the total amount minted in the past five days to $3 billion.

data.title: Cognition AI in Early Talks for New Funding Round to Double Valuation
data.description:
Cognition AI is reportedly in the early stages of negotiations for a new funding round, according to ChainCatcher. The company aims to capitalize on the growing demand for generative artificial intelligence technology. Sources indicate that this round of financing could more than double the company's valuation to $25 billion.

One insider revealed that the AI programming startup is targeting to raise several hundred million dollars or more. The discussions are ongoing, and the terms may change.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI and NVIDIA Collaborate to Enhance Employee Productivity
data.description:
On April 24, OpenAI founder Sam Altman shared an email from NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang on social media. According to Jin10, Huang's email, addressed to all NVIDIA employees, encouraged the use of OpenAI's Codex programming tool. He urged the company's 10,000 employees across various departments, including engineering, product, legal, marketing, finance, sales, and human resources, to actively utilize this tool and its intelligent agents, describing them as 'teammates' and 'superpowers' for team collaboration.

Huang revealed that NVIDIA and OpenAI have collaborated within Endeavor to establish Codex Labs, providing learning support and hosting a series of online seminars aimed at enhancing employee efficiency.

data.title: Whales added 28.3 billion ASTEROID tokens in the past 9 hours, bringing their total holdings to 6.66 billion tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the whale 0x2D2D spent 368.23 ETH (approximately $857,000) to buy 28.3 billion ASTEROIDs in the past 9 hours. This address now holds a total of 6.66 billion ASTEROIDs, worth approximately $1.99 million.

data.title: The US Solomon Islands (SOL) spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $7.3314 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 23rd, Eastern Time), the total net inflow into SOL spot ETFs was $7.3314 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $6.2012 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $825 million. The second largest was the VanEck Solana ETF (VSOL), with a net inflow of $1.1302 million, also bringing its total historical net inflow to $1.1302 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs is $874 million, with an SOL net asset value ratio of 1.77%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.02 billion.
